data.body: When merging inside a secondary git worktree for /Users/cartine/foolery, the post-merge Knots sync hook failed after a successful merge with: git -C /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/approvals-main-integration/.knots/_worktree checkout knots -> fatal: 'knots' is already used by worktree at '/Users/cartine/foolery/.knots/_worktree'. Expected behavior: Knots commands/hooks invoked from a repo worktree should use the canonical repo root Knots worktree or otherwise avoid trying to check out an already-used branch. Repro: create a secondary worktree, merge a branch, observe post-merge hook importing knots updates then failing during .knots/_worktree checkout.
data.title: Fix Knots post-merge sync in git worktrees
